name: Admin Users Dashboard
description:
Build a dense **admin console** for user management (Claude Cookbook admin-table style + product UI density). Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only; Google Fonts OK; no React/Vue/CDN UI kits.

## Product
App name **Nimbus Admin**. Audience: internal ops. Goal: scan users, filter, take actions.

## Required layout & DOM
1. App shell: `#app-shell` with left sidebar `#sidebar` and main `#main`.
2. Sidebar: brand `#sidebar-brand` text Nimbus, nav items `#nav-overview` `#nav-users` `#nav-billing` `#nav-settings` (Users should look active via class `nav-active` on `#nav-users` or parent).
3. Top bar `#topbar` with page title `#page-title` (Users), search input `#global-search`, and avatar button `#user-menu`.
4. KPI row `#kpi-row` with ≥3 `.kpi-card`, each with `.kpi-label` and `.kpi-value` (numbers OK as static).
5. Toolbar `#table-toolbar`: filter select `#filter-role` options All/Admin/Member/Viewer, status select `#filter-status` options All/Active/Invited/Suspended, button `#btn-invite` text matching /Invite|Add user/i.
6. Data table `#users-table` with thead columns at least: Name, Email, Role, Status, Last active, Actions.
7. tbody `#users-tbody` with ≥8 `.user-row` rows. Each row MUST include:
   - `.user-name`, `.user-email`
   - `.user-role` with text Admin|Member|Viewer
   - `.user-status` with text Active|Invited|Suspended and a status pill class `.status-pill`
   - actions: button `.btn-edit` and button `.btn-more` (or `.btn-delete`)
8. Pagination `#pagination` with `#page-prev`, `#page-next`, and label `#page-info`.
9. Empty state `#table-empty` (hidden by default when rows exist).
10. Modal `#invite-modal` (hidden by default) opened by `#btn-invite`, containing form `#invite-form` with inputs `#invite-email` `#invite-role` and buttons `#invite-cancel` `#invite-submit`.

## Behavior (vanilla JS)
- Clicking `#btn-invite` shows `#invite-modal` (remove hidden / set aria-hidden=false / class open).
- `#invite-cancel` or backdrop closes modal.
- Changing `#filter-role` or `#filter-status` filters visible rows (hide non-matching `.user-row`). Combine both filters with AND.
- `#global-search` filters rows by name/email substring (case-insensitive).
- Prefer accessible patterns: modal focus trap optional; `aria-modal` on modal; keyboard Esc closes modal.

## Visual bar
Dark dense product UI OR clean light ops UI. Use CSS variables. Table must be scannable (zebra or row hover). Avoid generic purple gradient marketing look.

Reply FINISHED when shell + table + filters + modal work.
source: Claude Cookbook frontend aesthetics Example 3 (admin panel data table) + Refero dashboard density patterns + common agent admin-console rubrics.
